SEARCH
Package bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model

Class FlightBookingSystem

java.lang.Object
bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.FlightBookingSystem
public class FlightBookingSystem extends Object
Represents the main flight booking system. Manages flights, customers, and the system date.
Version:
6.0 (Uses real system date)

    • FlightBookingSystem

      public FlightBookingSystem()

  • Method Details

    • getUsers

      public List<User> getUsers()

    • addUser

      public void addUser(User user) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException

    • getSystemDate

      public LocalDate getSystemDate()
      Gets the current system date. Returns the actual current date from the system clock.
      Returns:
      the system date (current date)

    • getFlights

      public List<Flight> getFlights()
      Gets all active (non-deleted) flights in the system.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of all non-deleted flights

    • getAllFlights

      public List<Flight> getAllFlights()
      Gets ALL flights in the system including deleted ones. Used for data persistence.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of all flights (including deleted)

    • getFlightByID

      public Flight getFlightByID(int id) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Gets a flight by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the flight ID
      Returns:
      the flight with the specified ID
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if no flight with that ID exists

    • getCustomers

      public List<Customer> getCustomers()
      Gets all active (non-deleted) customers in the system.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of all non-deleted customers

    • getAllCustomers

      public List<Customer> getAllCustomers()
      Gets ALL customers in the system including deleted ones. Used for data persistence.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of all customers (including deleted)

    • getCustomerByID

      public Customer getCustomerByID(int id) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Gets a customer by their ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the customer ID
      Returns:
      the customer with the specified ID
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if no customer with that ID exists

    • addFlight

      public void addFlight(Flight flight) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Adds a new flight to the system.
      Parameters:
      flight - the flight to add
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if a duplicate flight exists

    • addCustomer

      public void addCustomer(Customer customer) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Adds a new customer to the system.
      Parameters:
      customer - the customer to add
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if a duplicate customer ID exists
